description: Controlled vocabulary for topic tagging. AI tag output is constrained to these terms and schema-validated; anything outside the list is rejected. In a real archive these would map INTO the institution's own subject-term list, never replace it.

terms.war: armed conflict, battles, front-line reports, war declarations
terms.military: armed forces, defense, soldiers, weapons, mobilization
terms.government: presidents, congress, legislation, policy, public administration
terms.international: foreign affairs, diplomacy, treaties, events abroad
terms.economy: business, markets, prices, trade, employment, industry
terms.labor: workers, unions, strikes, wages, working conditions
terms.health: medicine, disease, public health, hospitals, doctors
terms.disaster: natural disasters, accidents, fires, floods, emergencies
terms.religion: churches, faith, religious leaders and events
terms.agriculture: farming, crops, livestock, rural life, food production
terms.civil-rights: civil rights, segregation, discrimination, social justice
terms.entertainment: film, theater, music, radio programs, celebrities
terms.human-interest: everyday life, personal stories, community events
